responses: The college/university is highly secure, with 24/7 security personnel stationed at both entrance gates. Each gate is under constant CCTV surveillance to ensure safety at all times.

We take student safety very seriously. Both campus entrances have security guards and surveillance cameras, while the entire campus is monitored with a state-of-the-art security system. You can feel safe and secure on campus.
The university ensures full security with CCTV cameras covering all major areas, and security personnel at every entrance. Your safety is our top priority.
